title: verify-reproduction output
description:
Result of a reproduction comparison.

A mismatch or incomparable is a SUCCESSFUL run (exit-0, needs_decision=True)
— a discovered nondeterminism is the feature working, never an error.

stage_reached.description: Overall verdict: match, mismatch (any key mismatched), or incomparable.
stage_reached.title: Stage Reached

needs_decision.description: True for mismatch/incomparable (a FINDING the human decides on); False for match.
needs_decision.title: Needs Decision

reason.description: Code-rendered one-line summary: matched/mismatched/incomparable key counts + verdict.
reason.title: Reason

receipt.description: The full receipt record appended to reproduction_receipts.jsonl (self-contained).
receipt.title: Receipt

receipt_path.description: Absolute path of the append-only receipts ledger this verification appended to.
receipt_path.title: Receipt Path
